popularStory.headline: THE COURTNEY FAMILY HISTORY FOLLOWS:
popularStory.description:
2-a: SIR PHILIP COURTENAY (1404-1463) \\
LADY ELIZABETH HUNERFORD (1407-1476) \\

SIR PHILIP COURTENAY, KNIGHT was born 18 January 1404, at Aston, Warwickshire, England, to John Courtenay (1377-1407) …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight於1404年1月18日出生在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆 卡素時，他的父親Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderham21歲，母親Joan Champernowne29歲。他於大約1425年與Elizabeth Hungerford在英國戴文波德哈姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1463年12月16日在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight was born on 18 January 1404, in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderham, was 21 and his mother, Joan Champernowne, was 29. He married Elizabeth Hungerford about 1425, in Powderham, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 December 1463, in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight est né le 18 janvier 1404, à Powderham Castle, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderham, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan Champernowne, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hungerford environ 1425, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1463, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight am 18. Januar 1404 in Powderham Castle, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderham 21 und seine Mutter Joan Champernowne 29. Er hat um 1425 in Powderham, Devon, England Elizabeth Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Dezember 1463 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knightが1404年1月18日にイギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハム カストルで生まれた時，父Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderhamは21歳，母Joan Champernowneは29歳であった。約1425年にイギリスデボンポウデルハムでElizabeth Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1463年12月16日にイギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハムで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight(이)가 1404년 1월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderham(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Champernowne(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1425년 영국 데폰 파우더함에서 Elizabeth Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1463년 12월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight nasceu em 18 de janeiro de 1404, em Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderham, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan Champernowne, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hungerford aproximadamente 1425, em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1463, em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight родился 18 января 1404 г. в местности поудирам кастл, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderham было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Champernowne, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hungerford около 1425 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 декабря 1463 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности поудирам, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Philip Courtenay, of Powderham, Knight nació el 18 de enero de 1404, en Powderham Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Courtenay, Knight of Powderham, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan Champernowne, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hungerford aproximadamente 1425, en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1463, en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
